title: Luminarc Dose Big Pot Club Jar with lid 2 Litre, 1 Piece
features: Comes with a bobble top push-lid
description: When you think of traditional sweet shops you can see the jars lining the walls filled with bight coloured sweets, and candies. This Luminarch Big Potclub 2.0L bobble top jar creates that sweet shop feeling wherever it is, so would be the perfect addition to your kitchen counters or party!
